description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and in Arabic script. Dating: 12th century. Featuring Abū ʿAlī Yeḥezqel Al-Dimyāṭī, the brother of Ḥalfon b. Netanel, as well as Khalaf al-ʿAdanī.
tags: list, India Book unedited, ib-addenda, IB4, Arabic script
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
